actor.goal: to move handoff packets through each lane and update status

story.iWant: to move handoff packets through each lane and update status
story.soThat: live cognition can be observed without invisible agent execution

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Conveyor Runner owns only: run envelope, lane dispatch, status ledger, handoff sequencing, sync and async progression.
Conveyor Runner must not own: lane content meaning, truth judgment, shipping authority, worker response invention.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.

forbiddenClaims: Conveyor Runner owns lane content meaning
Conveyor Runner owns worker response invention
